Event: Royal Challenge - Season 27
Event Date: 01/07/2024
Sage Bot Item Code: AM110
Gorgon's Gaze Amulet

Once in a while, the unit turns 3 random enemies to stone for 3 sec. During this time, they can’t move and take 35% more damage. Also, the amulet wearer steals 50% magic armor from petrified units for 3 sec.

Requirements: 98-100
